name: PRAZMA CANON
description: Fires three arcing, spiralling purple rounds. Each main round sheds additional mini-projectiles along its path that deal reduced damage. As an E-tech launcher it consumes 2 ammo per trigger pull, and as a Bandit launcher it releases three shots at once.
notes: The splitting trail makes it strong against big targets and clustered mobs at range, where more submunitions have time to spawn. Its smaller splash than many E-tech launchers also lets you use it closer in to land all three main rounds on one enemy with less risk of self-damage. You can also fire straight up to carpet a wide area, but stray blasts can strip shields quickly.
